name: save-clipboard
title: Save Clipboard
description: Save files that you have in your clipboard to your device.
author: untitledpng

preferences.name: defaultDirectory
preferences.title: Default Save Location
preferences.description: The default directory to save clipboard content to

commands.name: save-clipboard
commands.title: Save Clipboard
commands.description: Save files or screenshots from your clipboard to a chosen location on your device.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
